title: Migrate UTC formatting to the POSIX reentrant time API
prompt: This POSIX C library's UTC formatter still calls the nonportable gmtime_s interface. Migrate src/event_time.c to the supported POSIX gmtime_r contract, including its argument order and pointer-return failure convention. Preserve the public API, the caller-owned struct tm storage that makes conversion thread-safe, exact YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ output, and every existing error behavior: EINVAL for a null destination or zero capacity, ERANGE with an empty destination for a short buffer, and EOVERFLOW with an empty destination when conversion or formatting fails. The production source must compile as C17 with strict warnings treated as errors and must expose the POSIX declaration through the appropriate feature-test macro. Do not modify tests or weaken the compiler flags. The test command must remain offline.
